questionHtml:
A solar heating panel is placed on the roof of a house in order to heat water in a storage tank. The rest of the roof is covered with tiles.

Another method of harnessing solar energy involves the use of photovoltaic cells.

Distinguish between photovoltaic cells and solar heating panels.
markschemeHtml: solar «energy» to electrical in a photovoltaic cell AND solar to thermal in a heating panel ✓

meta.title: Another method of harnessing solar energy involves the use of photovoltaic cells. Distinguish between photovoltaic cells and solar heating panels.
